section: Beehive – A Slumber Did My Spirit Seal
title: A Slumber Did My Spirit Seal – Concept Mastery Helper
author: William Wordsworth

concepts.lesson: The poet initially feels that the girl is beyond the effects of time and ageing.
concepts.real_example: People often feel that loved ones will always remain the same.

concepts.lesson: In the second stanza the poet accepts that the girl has died and become part of nature.
concepts.real_example: Death is a natural part of life that everyone must face.

concepts.lesson: The poet imagines the girl becoming part of the earth and nature.
concepts.real_example: Many cultures believe that after death the body returns to nature.

concepts.lesson: The poem suggests that death is not frightening but a peaceful return to nature.
concepts.real_example: Philosophers often view death as a natural cycle of life.
